Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/chat/api/message -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"userId":"test_user","sessionId":"test_session_123","message":"我刚才说了什么？"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/chat/api/message -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8' -d '{"userId":"test_user","sessionId":"test_session_456","message":"你好，我是张三"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/chat/api/message -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8' -d '{"userId":"test_user","sessionId":"test_session_456","message":"我叫什么名字？"}')
